title: Reasons to Hold Principal Financial (PFG) Stock Right Now
text: Principal Financial (PFG) stands to gain from strong retention and employment growth, higher single premium annuity sales and a solid capital position.

title: Regional banks facing credit losses for commercial real estate: Moody's study
text: A survey of commercial real estate exposure by U.S. regional banks reveals increasing asset risk and potential credit losses as loans mature over the next 18 months, Moody's Investors Service said.
